creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
Have you tried 'poudriere bulk' without "-b latest"? Or wait until the updated package (pkg 1.19.1_2) is available.

# pkg fetch pkg
# ls -l /var/cache/pkg/pkg-1*
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel       27 Jun 27 08:11 /var/cache/pkg/pkg-1.19.1_1.pkg -> pkg-1.19.1_1~258287a809.pkg
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  9550253 Jun 10 03:22 /var/cache/pkg/pkg-1.19.1_1~258287a809.pkg
